name: copilotprompts-ai-use-case-qualifier
title: The Use Case Qualifier: qualify AI ideas before you build
shortDescription: A structured five-dimension qualification agent that scores AI use cases, recommends the right Microsoft platform, and produces a shareable Go/No-Go report.
longDescription: The Use Case Qualifier guides partners, consultants, and AI program leads through a structured qualification conversation before committing to build an AI solution. It scores the use case across five weighted dimensions - Business Value, Technical Feasibility, Adoption Readiness, Governance and Compliance, and Scope and Delivery Risk - recommends the right Microsoft AI platform from the full stack (M365 Copilot, Copilot Studio, Azure AI Foundry, AI Builder, Microsoft Fabric), surfaces the top risks and success factors, and produces a formatted qualification report ready for stakeholder review. The methodology is inspired by the Microsoft Jumpstart use case qualification approach used in enterprise AI programs.

thumbnails.alt: The Use Case Qualifier - sample qualification report output in Microsoft 365 Copilot
